Throws an ice cube that slides across blocks
Ice cubes inflict frostburn on the target for a short time
ItemTooltip.IcyAxe: Cold to the touch... may freeze your hands
ItemTooltip.IcyPickaxe: Cold to the touch... may freeze your hands
ItemTooltip.TheSnowball: It's too hot or too cold. Either way, it hurts A LOT

You can only have one active familiar at a time
Right-click to select familiar actions
Left-click to perform the selected action

Increases all damage by 2

ItemTooltip.LeatherSheath:
Strikes with swords, axes and pickaxes deal {0}% damage and critical strike chance is increased by {1}%
The weapon must be held and unused for {2} seconds
ItemTooltip.WebGun: Fires a sticky glob of wet web
ItemTooltip.RainStone:
'It is said this strange stone was torn from an entity that could control the seas...'
Activates or dissipates a storm
ItemTooltip.BubbleConch: Creates a barrage of bubbles that lift enemies
ItemTooltip.JellyfishResonator:
Summons the Queen Jellyfish
Can only be used at the beach during the day
ItemTooltip.SeaTurtlesBulwak:

ItemTooltip.ArcaneArmorFabricator: A mystical device that can fabricate arcane items
ItemTooltip.BloodAltar:
Used to summon the Viscount

ItemTooltip.MagmaLocket:
Upon contact with lava, grants the Lava's Embrace effect for 10 seconds

ItemTooltip.SpringSteps: Allows you to perform super jumps while running
ItemTooltip.MixTape: Symphonic critical strikes cause an eruption of melted musical notes

ItemTooltip.ThoriumMail:

ItemTooltip.ThoriumGreaves:

ItemTooltip.LifeQuartzClaymore: Recovers life when hitting an enemy
ItemTooltip.TechniqueBlankScroll: Used to craft unique technique skills
ItemTooltip.EnchantedCane: Summons a shield that stuns nearby enemies
ItemTooltip.EnchantedStaff: Summons an enchanted bolt that regenerates mana upon killing an enemy
ItemTooltip.LifeShieldLabel: You constantly generate a {0} life shield

ItemTooltip.DeepStaff:

ItemTooltip.SalamanderEye: In combat, your life recovery increases by 1
ItemTooltip.GiantShellSpine: In combat, your defense increases by 1 over time, up to a maximum of 4
ItemTooltip.CrawdadClaw: In combat, your armor penetration increases by 1 over time, up to a maximum of 2

Requires Storm Flare ammo to function

ItemTooltip.SoulStone:
+10% summon damage

ItemTooltip.Crietz: After a second, your next critical attack causes an energy explosion that hits nearby enemies
ItemTooltip.Robe:
Increases maximum mana by 40

ItemTooltip.SeaTurtlesBulwark: When taking damage, releases a tangible particle that recovers 25% of the damage taken
ItemTooltip.BandofReplenishment:

ArmorSetBonus.LivingWood: Your Living Wood Sapling's automatic attack will chase enemies
ArmorSetBonus.Icy: A freezing aura stabilizes, incinerating nearby enemies with frost flames
ArmorSetBonus.Silk: 25% increased magic damage while above 90% maximum mana
ArmorSetBonus.YewWood: Every 6 hits, your next ranged attack deals a 150% mini-critical strike
ArmorSetBonus.Sandstone: The desert winds have granted you a sand double jump
ArmorSetBonus.Coral:
Increases radiant damage by 1
Radiant damage accumulates up to 20 life shield
ArmorSetBonus.Blooming: Your healing spells increase life recovery
ArmorSetBonus.Ebon: Corrupts your radiant powers, causing them to assume dark forms and cause additional effects
ArmorSetBonus.NoviceCleric: Each second, a cross is generated. Upon hitting an enemy with radiant damage, the crosses will follow the enemy
ArmorSetBonus.Criers: Your symphonic empowerments will last 3 seconds longer
ArmorSetBonus.TideHunter: Ranged attacks have a chance to unleash a burst of foam
ArmorSetBonus.Jester: 10% chance to ring a bell over your head, slowing all nearby enemies briefly
ArmorSetBonus.Jester2: 10% chance to ring a bell over your head, slowing all nearby enemies briefly

BuffDescription.LivingWoodAcornBuff: This little one is giving its all to protect the world
BuffDescription.MagmaCharmBuff: Your body has shrunk into a magma larva
BuffDescription.LavaHugBuff: Regenerates life and mana every 2 seconds
BuffDescription.EnchantedCaneBuff: You are protected by an enchanted barrier
BuffDescription.CharmedBuff: Decreases contact damage by 25% and movement speed by 10%
BuffDescription.SpiritsGraceBuff: Grants increased invulnerability time and movement speed
BuffDescription.OvergrowthBuff: Vital restoration heals more and its chance has been increased
BuffDescription.SheathBuff: Your equipped sheath is ready to strike
BuffDescription.SoulEssenceBuff: Upon reaching 5 stacks of soul essence, you recover 5 life and 20 mana

Bestiary.ArmyAnt: An aggressive ant that patrols the depths of the jungle in search of prey.
Bestiary.Blacksmith: A skilled craftsman who shapes metal into weapons and tools. His work is as reliable as his temper is steady.
Bestiary.DesertAcolyte: The Desert Acolyte is quite nervous, but sells all sorts of equipment for those interested in throwing things at monsters.
Bestiary.Cobbler: The Cobbler long ago retired from his heroic days, but continues to supply quality footwear for the next generation.
Bestiary.Diverman: The Diverman is a curious adventurer in search of the mysterious Aquatic Depths. He's willing to sell some submerged treasures.
Bestiary.ConfusedZombie: The Confused Zombie is a chemist who turned into a zombie. Although he's managed to retain most of his sanity, he's still a bit strange.
Bestiary.FireAnt: It emerged straight from hell, like a flaming ant seeking heat.
Bestiary.StrangeBulb: A bizarre plant species that has yet to reach maturity. Perhaps it's better that way.
Bestiary.MahoganyEnt: A sentient mass of mahogany that seeks to protect the jungle's flora by lethal means.
Bestiary.EarthenGolem: A huge construct of compacted stone and earth, animated by ancient forces. It remains dormant until disturbed, then reacts with crushing force.
Bestiary.EarthenBat: A rudimentary bat formed from stone that hides in cave ceilings. It dives at intruders with surprising speed despite its rigid body.
Bestiary.GildedBat: A large golden bat. Its metallic sheen reflects light to disorient prey before striking.
Bestiary.GildedLycan: A fearsome predator covered in natural golden armor. It stalks its prey patiently before delivering swift, brutal attacks.
Bestiary.GildedSlime: A viscous organism infused with golden particles. It absorbs impacts easily and slowly engulfs anything careless enough to get close.
Bestiary.GildedSlimeling: A smaller version of the Gilded Slime. Less resilient, but far more numerous and irritatingly persistent.
Bestiary.TheGrandThunderBird: Blessed with mastery over storms, this majestic bird soars the desert skies. It seemed to be testing you...
Bestiary.StormHatchling: An electrically charged apparition of a young Thunder Bird.
Bestiary.TheInnocent: This innocent creature roamed the forests of Terraria peacefully before the dark corruption reached it.
Bestiary.LivingHemorrage: A grotesque teratoma formed from the very flesh of the Crimson. It doesn't usually fall easily.
Bestiary.CoinBagGold: You'd think gold would make this greedy sack of coins heavier, but it only increases its determination to flee from Terrarians.
Bestiary.CoinBagCopper: This enchanted pile of coins gained consciousness only recently, but will do anything to keep its riches to itself.
Bestiary.FlamekinCaster: A bizarre creature uses the power of lava pools found deep in the caverns to summon explosive fire bats.
Bestiary.Biter: The zombification process can result in individualities. This one simply bleeds a lot.
Bestiary.Clot: As we said, it doesn't like to fall easily.
Bestiary.ManofWar: With an unmatched sting and a tendency to become inexplicably invulnerable, this is one tough jellyfish.
Bestiary.Sharptooth: Though the name is quite obvious, it took one bite of a Terrarian's hand for this fish to earn its title.
Bestiary.Hammerhead: This poor guy couldn't figure out how to stand out among his shark friends... until he decided to use his head.
Bestiary.GraveLimb: A necrotic, stubborn appendage that loves ripping faces off. Undoubtedly the worst facial massage you'll ever receive!
Bestiary.PatchWerk: A horrifying creature formed from the decomposing, maggot-infested remains of Terrarians. It cries out to whoever is listening, begging to be put down.
Bestiary.Abomination: The stitched-together remains of several zombies. The seams themselves have seen better days...
Bestiary.FamishedMaggot: A ferocious worm, known for its propensity to attack in swarms.
Bestiary.BloodDrop: The animated blood behaves remarkably similarly to Terraria's slimes.
Bestiary.SeveredLegs: These legs were made for walking, and that's exactly what they'll do... well, actually, that's all they can do.
Bestiary.ZealousJellyfish: A red jellyfish that loves charging at enemies for its Queen.
Bestiary.SpittingJellyfish: A yellow jellyfish that loves spitting bubbles at enemies for its Queen.
Bestiary.DistractingJellyfish: A blue jellyfish that loves taking hits for its Queen.
Bestiary.CoinBagSilver: After passing through the caverns, this coin bag leaves the area as soon as a greedy Terrarian appears.

NPCChat.Blacksmith_2: A good blade makes all the difference.
NPCChat.Blacksmith_3: I can hear the metal calling.
NPCChat.Blacksmith_4: Bring the materials, I'll make it worth your while.
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_1: We have quite strange people in this town, don't you think...?
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_2: You didn't see shadows of giant birds while in the desert, did you?
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_3: I'd only stopped to fill my canteen, but you look like someone capable of handling a real threat!
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_4: Have you heard of the Thunder Birds? Legend says they protected our world from catastrophic threats, until a conflict between them and three individuals led to their disappearance...
NPCChat.ConfusedZombie_1: I can't remember much of my past life... I think chemicals and such were my passion; I only get fragments of the truth. Sometimes it's kind of sad...
NPCChat.ConfusedZombie_2: Most people don't have the stomach to deal with the things I sell. The trick is to have no stomach at all!
NPCChat.ConfusedZombie_3: I need to thank you for letting me stay here. Going out only at night is quite boring...
NPCChat.ConfusedZombie_4: Why am I not like the others...? Oh, sorry, did you need something?
NPCChat.Cobbler_1: In my younger days, I too was a hero. But after a nasty fall, I retired. Perhaps if I'd had better boots back then, I'd still be out saving the world...
NPCChat.Cobbler_2: Don't worry, young adventurer. The journey may be difficult, but I have complete confidence in you!
NPCChat.Cobbler_3: Proper footwear is no joke, {0}. Always keep your shoes clean and ready for adventure!
NPCChat.Cobbler_4: You learn a lot by walking a mile in someone else's shoes. Too bad some of the locals here have never done that...
NPCChat.Cobbler_5: How are you, {0}? Have you been careful out there in the wild lands?
NPCChat.Cobbler_Guide: So it was {0} who's been giving you advice all this time? It's always good to see a young person valuing studies.
NPCChat.Cobbler_PartyGirl: Can you believe {0} wanted to throw me a birthday party? It's been so long since I've had one!
NPCChat.Cobbler_Wizard: Oh my... I think {0} might be even older than me!
NPCChat.Diverman_1: Have you ever ventured into the aquatic depths...? Its suffocating atmosphere keeps most explorers out, but I'm sure you'll find a way around that...
NPCChat.Diverman_2: I've collected many maritime items on my travels, hero. Would you like to buy one?
NPCChat.Diverman_3: Spending long periods at the bottom of the ocean taught me one thing: always be prepared!
NPCChat.Diverman_4: You'd think it would be hard to breathe with this helmet, but I've actually gotten used to it.
NPCChat.Diverman_5: Have you ever tried drinking a bottle of water while drowning to save yourself? I have!
NPCChat.Diverman_6: The ocean rewards the curious... and punishes the unprepared. The second part usually comes first.
NPCChat.Diverman_7: If you hear something swimming behind you, don't look back. Keep swimming. It works... sometimes.
NPCChat.Diverman_8: The best discoveries are always at the bottom of the sea. Coincidentally, the most dangerous monsters too.
NPCChat.Diverman_9: I've slept with the fishes once, it was the worst feeling.
NPCChat.Diverman_10: Never underestimate a small sea creature. It usually has much bigger friends nearby.
NPCChat.Diverman_11: If you plan to explore submerged caves, bring plenty of light. The darkness down there seems alive.
NPCChat.Diverman_12: Breathing underwater seems impossible... until you find the right equipment.

Blacksmith.Content: Strange... the forge didn't sing even once today.
Blacksmith.DislikeCrowded: Too many people, too much noise... ruins the work.
Blacksmith.DislikeNPC: I prefer to keep my distance from {0}.
Blacksmith.HateBiome: {0} suffocates the flame. Can't work like that.
Blacksmith.HateCrowded: This chaos? No forge breathes in a place like this.
Blacksmith.HateNPC: {0} wears out my patience more than raw steel.
Blacksmith.LikeBiome: {0}... isn't bad. The forge holds steady here.
Blacksmith.LikeNPC: {0} understands the value of good work.
Blacksmith.LoveBiome: Now that's it—{0}. This is where a forge should be.
Blacksmith.LoveSpace: Plenty of space, stable air... that's how a forge breathes.
Blacksmith.NoHome: A forge needs a decent place. This won't do.
Blacksmith.FarFromHome: Being away from my tools doesn't feel right.
Blacksmith.SpecialMoodText: I don't work steel under moonlight. Nothing good comes of it.

DesertAcolyte.Content: The desert speaks in silence... you just have to listen.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeBiome: {0} seems... unnatural. The sands reject it.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeCrowded: Too many voices drown out the whispers of this place.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeNPC: {0} disturbs the balance I try to maintain.
DesertAcolyte.HateBiome: {0} suffocates the spirit of the desert. I can't stay here.
DesertAcolyte.HateCrowded: This noise... I can't hear the sands.
DesertAcolyte.HateNPC: {0} only brings disturbance. I don't want to get involved.
DesertAcolyte.LikeNPC: {0} follows a path not so different from mine.
DesertAcolyte.LoveBiome: Yes... {0} resonates with the true voice of the desert.
DesertAcolyte.LoveNPC: {0} understands more than they appear to.
DesertAcolyte.LoveSpace: The open air... the wind brings clarity here.
DesertAcolyte.NoHome: I need a place where the winds can pass freely.
DesertAcolyte.FarFromHome: Too far... I no longer feel the presence of the desert.
DesertAcolyte.SpecialMoodText: The winds are restless today... something moves beneath the sands.

ConfusedZombie.Content: I'm fine and full of life, thanks.
ConfusedZombie.DislikeBiome: {0} just... doesn't feel right. My joints hurt here.
ConfusedZombie.DislikeCrowded: My neighbors are a bit rude to me just because of what I am, it's so sad...
ConfusedZombie.DislikeNPC: {0} keeps giving me really weird looks.
ConfusedZombie.HateBiome: Do I like it here... Do I fear for my life... Do I li- Nope. Nope. I'm out.
ConfusedZombie.HateCrowded: So many people here! A full banquet... O-oh, you didn't hear that, did you?
ConfusedZombie.HateNPC: I bet {0} has a big, juicy brain... Not that I want... uh... do you need something?
ConfusedZombie.LikeBiome: {0}... at least it's bearable around here.
ConfusedZombie.LikeNPC: {0} always opens the doors for me, so thoughtful!
ConfusedZombie.LoveBiome: The forest just... makes me happy, as if I belong here.
ConfusedZombie.LoveNPC: I feel a strange but good connection with {0}. I don't know why, I just feel it.
ConfusedZombie.LoveSpace: I love an empty space, it leaves me in peace to make my repellents without worrying about others.
ConfusedZombie.NoHome: Ah, it seems I forgot where my house was. Can you help me with that?
ConfusedZombie.FarFromHome: Walk ten steps, look around, if I'm not home, then... what was that again...
ConfusedZombie.SpecialMoodText: Why am I not like the others? Oh, sorry, did you need something?

Cobbler.Content: I've still got plenty of energy, don't worry!
Cobbler.DislikeBiome: I'm too old to go walking around {0}.
Cobbler.DislikeCrowded: There are too many people around here, don't you think?
Cobbler.DislikeNPC: {0} could learn a thing or two about proper footwear.
Cobbler.HateBiome: If I were younger I'd even take on {0}, but now I'm too old for that!
Cobbler.HateCrowded: I can't keep up with so many shoe orders. It's too crowded around here.
Cobbler.HateNPC: {0} is just waiting for an accident to happen with those shoes.
Cobbler.LikeBiome: {0} isn't a bad place for a walk.
Cobbler.LikeNPC: {0} understands the importance of good footwear.
Cobbler.LoveBiome: The forest really is the best place for a walk.
Cobbler.LoveSpace: It's much easier to focus on work when I have some space. That really lifts my spirits!
Cobbler.NoHome: It's hard to work without a workshop. Think you can help me with that?
Cobbler.FarFromHome: I'll need to give my shoes a once-over when I get back home...
Cobbler.SpecialMoodText: My knees aren't what they used to be, but I can still recognize a good pair of adventurer boots.

Diverman.Content: The ocean depths hide wonders... and many ways to drown.
Diverman.DislikeBiome: I'm not fond of exploring {0}. I prefer where there's enough water to dive.
Diverman.DislikeCrowded: Too many people here. I can barely hear the sound of the waves.
Diverman.DislikeNPC: {0} looks like the type who'd jump into the sea without any preparation.
Diverman.HateBiome: {0} and I have never gotten along. There's nothing to explore there.
Diverman.HateCrowded: Crowds make me uneasy. The bottom of the sea is much calmer.
Diverman.HateNPC: {0} has clearly never faced the depths. You can tell from a distance.
Diverman.LikeBiome: {0} has some good spots for a dive.
Diverman.LikeNPC: {0} seems to understand that preparation makes all the difference in an adventure.
Diverman.LoveBiome: Nothing beats the ocean. The deeper, the better.
Diverman.LoveNPC: {0} would certainly be good company on an underwater expedition.
Diverman.LoveSpace: It's nice to have a little space. That way I can look after my equipment without interruptions.
Diverman.NoHome: I need a place to store my diving equipment. Can you provide one?
Diverman.FarFromHome: I'm starting to miss my base. Keeping equipment in order makes a difference.
Diverman.SpecialMoodText: The ocean always holds a new discovery for those with the courage to explore its depths.

DeathMessage.DeepStaff: {0} drained their own soul for power, leading to their death
